metadata.description: Skills and plugins for customizing VibeData data engineering agents with organizational standards for ingestion, extraction, source systems, and business rules

plugins.name: ad-migration
plugins.description: Migrate stored procedures to dbt models — scoping, profiling, test generation, and model generation pipeline

plugins.name: fabric-cli
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric CLI operations — workspace management, notebook execution, pipeline orchestration, OneLake file I/O, lakehouse tables, and MCP server integration

plugins.name: fabric-semantic-model
plugins.description: Build, validate, and manage Microsoft Fabric semantic models using TMDL with AI-assisted DAX authoring and model design

plugins.name: vibedata-dbt-skills
plugins.description: Customize VibeData dbt agents with Fabric modeling, snapshot, semantic layer, and Elementary quality standards

plugins.name: vibedata-dlt-skills
plugins.description: Customize VibeData ingestion agents with dlt REST API standards for ADLS Gen2, OneLake, and Fabric lakehouses

plugins.name: vibedata-domain-skills
plugins.description: Customize VibeData modeling agents with business rules, including revenue recognition on dbt and Microsoft Fabric

plugins.name: vibedata-ingestion-skills
plugins.description: Customize VibeData extraction agents with source-system standards, including Salesforce extraction with dlt and dbt
